description: Cross-reference the theater rehearsal schedule with actor availability to identify scheduling conflicts. Create a 'Conflict' column in the spreadsheet to flag instances where assigned actors are unavailable during their scheduled rehearsal times.

natural_language.prompt: You are assisting with a community theater production. Three actors just updated their availability, and some scheduled rehearsals now have conflicts. Add a conflict detection column to the Rehearsal_Schedule sheet that uses formulas to cross-reference the Actor_Availability sheet. Flag any rehearsal where at least one assigned actor is unavailable on that date. Apply conditional formatting to highlight conflicts.
